common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: user_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a user.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by(depends on different APIs) partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token,  user_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm.

define: You need to call v2.media.init_video_upload, v2.media.upload_video_part, and v2.media.complete_video_upload to upload the video, then call the v2.video.edit_video_info API to set video post information, finally call this API to post the video to Shopee Video.

error_list.description: Invalid video source. Please re-upload the video using v2.media.init_video_upload  with correct business & scene.

common_error_list.name: error_limit
common_error_list.description: The total API call number made by your APP has reached the daily API call limit, please try again after 00: 00 (UTC+08:00)

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit
common_error_list.description: Too many requests. You have reached the rate limit. Please try again later.

common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

request_params.description: ID of uploaded video. Obtain from v2.media.get_video_upload_result. No more than 5.
request_params.name: video_upload_id_list

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

children.description: The unique identifier for post Shopee Video.
children.name: post_id

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/video/post_video?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp&user_id=user_id',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "video_upload_id_list": [
        "sg-11110199-6v8gq-mgbni6rb44qz04"
    ]
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
